category_sources: Official Apache Batik page describes it as a Java-based toolkit for SVG images.
source_facts.description: Java-based toolkit for SVG images.
display_name_sources: Official Apache XML Graphics site uses Apache Batik branding.
source_facts.homepage is the Apache Batik project page.
docs_sources: Official Apache Batik site includes Using Batik and Batik Tools documentation sections.
repo_sources: Official Apache XML Graphics Code Repositories page lists Apache Batik at github.com/apache/xmlgraphics-batik and gives the git clone URL.
tags_sources: Official Apache Batik site and source_facts.description identify Batik as Java tooling for SVG images.
